revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''1-1-065

Condition at which, even under the possible effect of hazards, defects or stresses, the intended purpose of an installation (equipment) or of a process is guaranteed to the necessary extent.

{{IALAFooter}}
